## What changed
- Summarize the main changes introduced in this pull request.
- Mention affected files or behaviors.

## Why
- Explain the problem being solved.
- Provide context or motivation behind the change.

## How to test
1. Activate environment:
   source .venv/Scripts/activate (Windows) or source .venv/bin/activate (Mac/Linux)
2. Install dependencies:
   pip install -r requirements-prework.txt
3. Run tests:
   pytest tests/

Expected result:
- All tests pass without errors.

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title is clear and specific
- [ ] Change is limited to one logical scope
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No debug code or temporary prints left
